title: ২৫০০ বছরের পুরোনো দুশমনি: ইসরায়েল কি ‘মরদখাই’? ইরান কি ‘হামান’?
comment: The article frames Palestine positively by sympathetically highlighting the threat of annihilation faced by its people. It critically analyzes the biblical and political rhetoric used by Israeli leaders to justify attacks on Palestinians, implicitly advocating for Palestinian survival.

title: সুমুদ ফ্লোটিলা নিয়ে গাজাবাসীর ভাবনা ও বাংলাদেশে যে তর্ক–বিতর্ক
comment: The op-ed is highly supportive and positive toward Palestine. It passionately defends international efforts to break the Gaza blockade, explicitly centers the voices and suffering of Palestinians, and urges readers to understand their heroic resistance.

title: লাল গরু এসে গেছে, আল-আকসা ভেঙে থার্ড টেম্পল গড়া হবে?
comment: The article is highly sympathetic to the Palestinian cause. It highlights the oppression of Palestinians in the West Bank and Gaza, and critically exposes extremist plans to destroy the Al-Aqsa Mosque, validating Palestinian fears and resistance.

title: গাজা বাহানামাত্র, লাল গরুতে সওয়ারিদের মূল নিশানা আল আকসা!
comment: The op-ed frames Palestine positively by centering its profound religious and historical importance. It sympathetically portrays Palestinians as victims of a historical conspiracy and ongoing genocide, implicitly supporting their right to their land and sacred sites.

title: ফিলিস্তিনের পক্ষে জাতিসংঘের সামনে ইহুদিদের অবস্থান
comment: The article positively frames the Palestinian cause by highlighting that even members of the Jewish community are protesting against Israel's 'crimes against humanity' in Gaza. This provides moral validation to the Palestinian struggle.

title: ফিলিস্তিন নামের ক্ষতকে পৃথিবী আর আড়াল করতে পারবে না
comment: This op-ed explicitly and passionately defends Palestine. It calls out the genocide committed by Israel and the US, justifies Palestinian resistance against decades of oppression, and concludes with the rallying cry 'Palestine will be free.'

title: ফিলিস্তিনের সঙ্গে যুদ্ধের বার্তা দিয়ে গ্রেপ্তার হওয়া ইসরায়েলি ফুটবলার মুক্ত
comment: The article is a factual sports/news report about an Israeli footballer who was arrested and then released in Turkey for displaying a message about the war. The text objectively reports the incident without adopting a positive or negative frame towards Palestine itself.

title: ফিলিস্তিনের পক্ষে থাকায় সাংবাদিককে চাকরিচ্যুত, প্রতিবাদে সাক্ষাৎকার দিলেন না উসমান খাজা
comment: The article frames Palestine positively by highlighting and validating the principled stance of cricketer Usman Khawaja and journalist Peter Lalor in defending the innocent people of Gaza against Israeli 'brutality'.

title: নাকবা দিবস: ফিলিস্তিন এখন আরও একা
comment: The op-ed is deeply sympathetic to Palestine. It frames Palestinians as historical victims of displacement ('Nakba') and critically exposes the 'hypocrisy' and betrayal of Arab leaders who have abandoned the Palestinian cause to appease Israel.

title: ফিলিস্তিন ও ইসলাম: অবিচ্ছেদ্য সম্পর্কের ৫ দিক
comment: The article is a highly positive, reverent tribute to Palestine. It glorifies the land through deep religious, historical, and spiritual Islamic contexts, portraying it as a sacred and blessed territory central to Muslim identity.
